description: Canonical source-to-target wiki node mapping for Cloud Docs to Cloud Docs (Redesign) synchronization.

notes: Use lark-cli >=1.0.47 to preserve copied image dimensions.
Generate replacement pairs from all mappings before syncing any section.
Scan synced target docs for remaining mapped source tokens after each section.
